name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or improvement for Rust Sign Painter
title: '[Feature Request]'
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem or just an addition? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of the problem.  
Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, screenshots, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

---

### Why this would be useful for Rust Sign Painter
*(Optional - helps us prioritize)*
- How often do you need this feature?
- Would it benefit most users or just a specific use-case (e.g. large clans, pixel artists, server admins, etc.)?

Thank you for helping make Rust Sign Painter better! 🎨
